PGA.Keybinding.Name: Open Grid Alignment Wizard
PGA.Keybinding.Hint: Opens or closes Precision Grid Aligner.
PGA.Panel.Title: Precision Grid Aligner
PGA.Panel.Subtitle: Drag the two green markers onto diagonal anchor points of a 3×3 grid.
PGA.GridType.Label: Grid type
PGA.Measurement.Label: Measurement per space
PGA.Split.Label: Split into 5-ft spaces
PGA.Warning.Placeables: Grid, background dimensions, and background offset are adjusted. Tokens, walls, lights, drawings, and other placeables are not scaled with the background.
PGA.Notifications.GMOnly: Only Game Masters can adjust the grid.
PGA.Notifications.NoScene: No active canvas scene is available.
PGA.Notifications.InvalidGridSize: The calculated grid is invalid or smaller than 20 px.
PGA.Notifications.GridConstructionFailed: The selected grid could not be constructed.
PGA.Notifications.UpdateFailed: The scene could not be updated. See the browser console for details.
